nodes.name: Compute All Diffs
nodes.notes: Unified 3-calendar diff. Classifies events by sync tag, builds 4 dedup maps, computes 6 sync directions, outputs one action per item. No encodeURIComponent — calendar IDs use literal %40.

nodes.name: Has Actions?
nodes.notes: TRUE = no actions needed (credential === 'none') → skip to Log Summary. FALSE = has actions → route to write nodes.

nodes.name: Route by Credential
nodes.notes: TRUE = write to RevOps. FALSE = check if Blackthorn.

nodes.name: Route Blackthorn
nodes.notes: TRUE = write to Blackthorn. FALSE = write to Iceberg.
